# FAOS Skills for Claude Cowork

> Exported on 2026-03-13 | 520 skills

## Overview

This directory contains FAOS custom skills exported for use in Claude Cowork.
Each skill is a self-contained directory with a `SKILL.md` file and optional supporting files (references, examples, assets, scripts).

## Installation

### Option 1: Upload as Zip (Individual Users)
1. Zip a skill folder (e.g., `deep-research/`)
2. Upload on claude.ai via Projects > Upload Skill

### Option 2: Cowork Plugin (Enterprise)
1. Create a plugin manifest (`plugin.md`)
2. Add skills to `skills/` directory
3. Add slash commands to `commands/`
4. Distribute via private GitHub repo → enterprise plugin marketplace

### Option 3: Direct File Access
1. Place skill folders in a directory Cowork can access
2. Reference in conversation: "Use the skill in [path]"

## Compatibility

These skills use the open Agent Skills standard and also work in:
- Claude Code (CLI)
- GitHub Copilot
- VS Code
- OpenAI Codex

## Source

These skills are exported from the [FAOS Agent Framework](https://github.com/frank-luongt/Foundation-AgenticOS)
using `scripts/export-skills.py`. The source of truth is `.faos/custom/skills/`.
